scope: Large, generated, or GitHub-unsuitable artifacts that should be referenced rather than uploaded.
github_policy: Do not upload raw JSONL data, NPZ datasets, model checkpoints, MATLAB binary outputs, downloaded zips, or raw_steps.jsonl. Keep them in local storage and record hashes here. Run scripts/validate_ai_handoff.py before publishing.
handoff_note: Account-switch handoff docs are lightweight Markdown and summarize project state, decisions, known mistakes, completed/unfinished work, next steps, and core reward/data/CQL logic. They are not large artifacts.

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Large generated JSONL; current .gitignore excludes reports/* and handoff should not contain raw candidate data.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: historical reward/candidate diagnostic and regression asset only; not formal CQL performance evidence

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Generated JSONL; record hash and row count instead of uploading raw transition rows.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: logged behavior transition diagnostics and dataset build source

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Generated NPZ dataset; GitHub handoff records metadata and hash only.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: CQL loader/interface smoke historical asset; not formal CQL performance proof

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Large generated raw/merged JSONL; use postprocessed and indexed summaries for GitHub review.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: raw merged coverage_v0 candidate side channel; candidates are not formal transitions

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Generated raw/merged JSONL; not needed in GitHub handoff.
Generated run result JSON under ignored reports/*; handoff summarizes current status instead.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: run result summary for diagnostics, not a formal performance claim

artifacts.why_not_uploaded: Model checkpoint is generated/legacy smoke output under ignored data/ and is not suitable for GitHub source handoff.
artifacts.reuse_boundary: legacy smoke artifact only; not current formal CQL result

other_ignored_artifact_classes.reason: Generated datasets, processed NPZ files, and legacy checkpoints.
Generated candidate/episode rows can be large and are summarized by reports and this manifest.
Generated transition datasets should be regenerated or fetched locally, not stored in GitHub source.
